details.test: Task 1: Cheapest 4+ star birthday bouquet under $40 with standard delivery next Friday
Task 2: Mother's Day bundle with bouquet and chocolates under $80
Task 3: Three different Thank You greeting cards with free shipping under $10 each
Task 4: Weekly mixed bouquet subscription under $50 starting next Monday
Task 5: Same-day roses in target city with 4.5+ stars and 20+ reviews
Task 6: Two potted plants totaling at least $60 and apply SPRING10 promo
Task 7: Customize large birthday bouquet with color scheme, gold wrap, and gift message
Task 8: Second-cheapest 4+ star scented candle between $25 and $40
Task 9: Guest checkout for one bouquet with standard shipping and cash on delivery
